verdict: AI displacement risk is moderate, with some tasks being automated but human judgment and creativity still essential.

reasoning_steps.title: Task automation
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 2, 4, and 10 can be partially automated with the help of computer-aided design (CAD) software and building information modeling (BIM).

reasoning_steps.title: Human judgment and creativity
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 1, 3, 5, 7, 9, and 11 require human judgment and creativity to ensure the quality and safety of the construction project.

adjacent_careers.name: Cabinetmaker
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Both carpenters and cabinetmakers work with wood, but cabinetmakers focus on creating custom furniture and cabinetry.

adjacent_careers.name: Construction Supervisor
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Construction supervisors oversee construction projects and ensure they are completed on time and within budget. While some tasks may be automated, human judgment and creativity are still essential for ensuring project success.

recent_developments.headline: New construction technology improves accuracy and efficiency
recent_developments.impact: This new technology may automate some tasks, but human judgment and creativity are still essential for ensuring the quality of the construction project.

recent_developments.headline: Hands-on trades remain among the least automated
recent_developments.impact: Physical, in-situ work captures very little AI use today; trades have the lowest exposure of any major occupation group.

quotes.quote: We do not have enough plumbers, electricians, or HVAC techs. AI cannot fix a leaking pipe. The shortage in the trades is only going to widen.
quotes.speaker: Mike Rowe
quotes.title: Host of Dirty Jobs; founder, mikeroweWORKS Foundation

quotes.quote: The tasks most exposed to large language models are not physical. Plumbers, electricians, and construction workers have the lowest exposure of any major occupation group.
quotes.speaker: Tyna Eloundou and Pamela Mishkin
quotes.title: Researchers, OpenAI
quotes.source: GPTs are GPTs: An Early Look at the Labor Market Impact Potential of LLMs

quotes.quote: The world is short on skilled tradespeople and we have spent two generations telling kids the only path is a four-year degree. AI is now coming for the desk jobs first.
quotes.speaker: Mark Cuban
quotes.title: Investor; co-founder, Cost Plus Drugs
